audit_items.proof_trace: Multiple allocations (flist, db, db->buf, db->fname) leak on error paths. Function returns -1 without cleanup when allocations fail at lines 419-422 or 426-429, leaving previously allocated memory unreachable.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers allocation failures during proxy reconfiguration through resource exhaustion, causing cumulative memory leaks that worsen with each failed restart attempt.
